allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Which Vitamin D3 \(cholecalciferol\) consolidation has the strongest evidence and what are the risks?"}]}')

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/_api_chat.json'\)\); print\('--- ANSWER ---'\); print\(d['answer']\); print\(\); print\('--- CITATIONS \(', len\(d['citations']\),'\) ---'\); [print\(c['doc_id'], c['label'], c['url']\) for c in d['citations']]; print\(\); print\('retrieved:', len\(d['retrieved']\)\)")
